hero.title: Authentic India & World Travel
hero.subtitle: Travel crafted by people who care
hero.description: Experience the real India with local experts and authentic cultural immersions.

tours.title: Popular Tours
tours.subtitle: Handpicked experiences for unforgettable journeys

goldenTriangle.title: Golden Triangle Tour
goldenTriangle.description: Explore India's iconic cities: Delhi, Jaipur, and Agra with private transport and guides.

itinerary.delhi: Qutub Minar, Humayun's Tomb, India Gate, Lotus Temple
itinerary.jaipur: Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar

includes: Pick up & Drop off at the Airport/Hotel
excludes: Fees for the use of photographic or video cameras

agraFullDay.title: Full Day Agra Tour
agraFullDay.description: Visit the Taj Mahal and Mughal monuments with sunrise viewing and expert narration.

itinerary.highlights: Taj Mahal (sunrise), Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri (optional)

excludes: Fees for the use of photographic or video cameras

jaipurDay.title: Jaipur Day Tour
jaipurDay.description: Experience the Pink City with visits to Amber Fort, City Palace, and vibrant markets.

itinerary.highlights: Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, local markets

excludes: Fees for the use of photographic or video cameras

delhiOldHalfDay.title: Half Day Old Delhi Tour
delhiOldHalfDay.description: Explore the historic Mughal Delhi with rickshaw rides and spice markets.

itinerary.highlights: Jama Masjid, Rickshaw Ride, Spice Market, Red Fort (from outside), Gurdwara Bangla Sahib

includes: Pick up & Drop off at the Airport/Hotel
excludes: Fees for the use of photographic or video cameras

delhiNewHalfDay.title: Half Day New Delhi Tour
delhiNewHalfDay.description: Discover modern Delhi's architectural marvels and government buildings.

itinerary.highlights: Humayun's Tomb, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, India Gate, Gurdwara Bangla Sahib

includes: Pick up & Drop off at the Airport/Hotel
excludes: Fees for the use of photographic or video cameras

delhiFullDay.title: Full Day New & Old Delhi Tour
delhiFullDay.description: Comprehensive tour covering both historic Old Delhi and modern New Delhi in one full day.

itinerary.highlights: Old Delhi: Jama Masjid, Red Fort, Spice Market, Rickshaw Ride. New Delhi: India Gate, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun's Tomb, Gurdwara Bangla Sahib

includes: Pick up & Drop off at the Airport/Hotel
excludes: Fees for the use of photographic or video cameras

tours.cannotFind: Can't find what you're looking for?

goldenTriangleMumbai.title: Golden Triangle With Mumbai
goldenTriangleMumbai.description: Explore India's iconic Golden Triangle along with the vibrant city of Mumbai, combining historical monuments, cultural experiences, and coastal charm.

itinerary.delhi: Jama Masjid, Raj Ghat, Chandni Chowk, Rickshaw Ride, Red Fort (outside), Spice Market, Humayun's Tomb, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, India Gate, President House, Gurdwara Bangla Sahib
itinerary.jaipur: Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, Hawa Mahal
itinerary.agra: Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, Mehtab Bagh
itinerary.mumbai: Gateway of India, Juhu Beach, Haji Ali Sufi Shrine, Elephanta Caves

includes: Pick up & Drop off at Airport/Hotel

goldenTriangleVaranasi.title: Golden Triangle Tour with Varanasi
goldenTriangleVaranasi.description: Combine the famous Golden Triangle with the spiritual heart of India, Varanasi, experiencing history, culture, and sacred traditions.

itinerary.delhi: Qutub Minar, Humayun's Tomb, Lotus Temple, India Gate, Jama Masjid, Chandni Chowk, Rickshaw Ride, Spice Market, Gurdwara Bangla Sahib
itinerary.jaipur: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar
itinerary.agra: Taj Mahal (Sunrise), Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri
itinerary.varanasi: Evening Ganga Aarti, Morning Boat Ride on the Ganges, Buddhist site of Sarnath

includes: Pick up & Drop off at Airport/Hotel/Train Station
